---
title: "Logo"
author: "Armin Rauschenberger"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---


```{r,eval=FALSE}
rm(list=ls())

grDevices::png(filename="collasso-logo.png",width=1000,height=200)

letters <- strsplit(x="collasso",split="")[[1]]
length <- ifelse(letters=="l",0.5,1)
pos_x <- cumsum(length)
#drop <- rep(x=c(0,-0.01,-0.015),times=c(length(letters)-2,1,1))
#pos_y <- cumsum(drop)
pos_y <- (4-pos_x)^2
gradient <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(c("#29ABE2", "#F7931E"))
colour <- gradient(n=length(letters))
angle <- 5*(pos_x-3)

graphics::par(mar=c(0,0,0,0))
graphics::plot.new()
xlim <- c(0,max(pos_x)) # +c(-1,1)*0.2*diff(range(pos_x)) 
ylim <- range(pos_y)+c(-1,1)*2*diff(range(pos_y))
graphics::plot.window(xlim=xlim,ylim=ylim)
for(i in seq_along(letters)){
  graphics::text(x=pos_x[i],y=pos_y[i],labels=letters[i],cex=20,pos=2,col=colour[i],font=2) #,srt=angle[i]  
}

grDevices::dev.off()
```
